text.message: after all I've done for you?
should i have robbed black after plowing them? lol
i would targeted him the whole game if he did that
why not on my turn though
nobody will ever trade on ur turn if they can avoid it
yea but then you expect me to take the same trade..
less crying in the chat is never a bad thing
but i doubt this dude actually leaves
if black got lucky they can win with a couple roads
its been blocked this whole time
